testcase.name: test_pdf_photo_larger_than_initials_only

failure.message: AssertionError: PDF with storage-key photo_url (52380B) is not meaningfully larger than PDF with no photo (52486B) — delta=-106B. This means ReportLab could NOT fetch the photo (likely 401 from protected /api/files endpoint). The 'photo in PDF' fix is incomplete — need to make file endpoint public for known clients OR pass an ?auth=<token> query param when normalising URL. assert -106 > 200

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter27_photo_url.py:178: in test_pdf_photo_larger_than_initials_only assert delta > 200, ( E AssertionError: PDF with storage-key photo_url (52380B) is not meaningfully larger than PDF with no photo (52486B) — delta=-106B. This means ReportLab could NOT fetch the photo (likely 401 from protected /api/files endpoint). The 'photo in PDF' fix is incomplete — need to make file endpoint public for known clients OR pass an ?auth=<token> query param when normalising URL. E assert -106 > 200
